label: Heat pusher comp
description: Pushes heat into the room, raising temperature.

heatPerSecond.label: Heat per second
heatPerSecond.description: Amount of heat pushed into the room per second.

heatPushMaxTemperature.label: Heat push max temperature
heatPushMaxTemperature.description: The component stops pushing heat when the room is above this temperature.

heatPushMinTemperature.label: Heat push min temperature
heatPushMinTemperature.description: The component stops pushing heat when the room is below this temperature.
